description: AdSense Host API is Google’s legacy API for AdSense host partners to manage publisher accounts, ad code, and reporting for hosted AdSense integrations. The related product pages now point developers toward AdSense for Platforms and the AdSense Management API for current integrations.
summary: 1 HTTP API: the Google AdSense Host API at `https://www.googleapis.com/adsensehost/v4.1/`, authenticated with Google OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens using the AdSense Host scope.
